gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 一场由误拨语音引发的跨时空浪漫，笑泪交织的治愈之作。
gems.whyWatchEn: A cross-distance romance sparked by a misdirected voicemail, blending laughter and tears into a heartfelt healing journey.
gems.audience: 喜欢《电子情书》式现代浪漫、不落俗套爱情故事的观众；偏爱情感细腻、幽默与感动并存的影迷。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of modern romance like 'You've Got Mail', who appreciate unconventional love stories with emotional depth and humor.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 经典玩具军团迎战数字时代，怀旧与创新的碰撞，但新意稍显不足。
gems.whyWatchEn: Classic toys face the digital age in a familiar yet heartfelt adventure; nostalgic but not groundbreaking.
gems.audience: 《玩具总动员》系列粉丝；有孩子的家庭观众；对科技与童年主题感兴趣的动画爱好者。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of the Toy Story franchise, families with children, and animation lovers interested in the theme of technology vs. childhood.
